description: Built omnifocus-tasks skill with static hardcoded project and tag lists embedded in the skill file. David corrected: projects and tags should be looked up live via MCP/osascript at task creation time, not maintained as a static reference list.
correction: The skill should query OmniFocus for current projects and tags at execution time, not rely on a snapshot that goes stale.
systemic_fix: Update omnifocus-tasks skill to pull live project/tag lists via mcp__omnifocus__get_active_projects and osascript tag query as part of the pre-flight checklist. Remove static lists from the skill file.
